question: How many distinct customer and services details are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_ID) + COUNT(DISTINCT Service_ID) + COUNT(DISTINCT Customers_and_Services_Details) FROM Customers_and_Services;

semantic.reason: 原始问题询问的是'How many distinct customer and services details are there?'，即客户和服务的详细信息数量，但SQL反向翻译仅统计了Customer_ID和Service_ID的独立数量，未涵盖其他可能的详细信息字段，因此语义不完全一致。
